item.title: This post shows how to get Elon Musk to pay them $47
item.description: Go to https://petition.theamericapac.org and sign the petition and put MuskIsDumb@cah.lol as the one who referred you and they owe them the $47. FP Edit: even if it doesn't go through. It might, and it would be a strike against them. This is a real action, Instead of a "thoughts and prayers"
item.dc:creator: CPK3

item.title: Poison Ivy - Harley Quinn Animated Series - Cosplay
item.description:
My Poison Ivy Cosplay based off the Harley Quinn Animated Series! Specifically her Scuba look from the episode L.O.D.R.S.V.P. - I actually wound up liking this series more than I ever expected... granted I did that thing where a couple episodes into season 2 I took a break and never returned... Does that mean... it actually wasn't good? Oh no... Either way I enjoy the depiction of Ivy in the series quite a bit and I thought her scuba look would be fun to replicate... Plus, I already had all the green paint from years of doing every green girl that exists...
Reference Image from the Episode :D
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Mini music dump, tired of looking for this in my favorites edition
item.description:
And a few bonuses
Will need this for spoopy season
Spending the day at my uncle's helping him out with stuff. Hey a hundred bucks for five hours of work is not bad
I will not do this for everyone. I am deathly afraid of heights. We were taking off the sheets to winterize. I showed him afterward, my hands were shaking like a leaf. I earned that smoke break after.
Anyway here's unrelated Belgian techno anthem Pump Up The Jam

item.dc:creator: OneInThePinkTwoInTheStink

item.title: All I want…
item.description: I’ve thought so much about this the last few days while I was sick with the flu. I haven’t been happy, like truly happy in a long time. Ive made changes to my life, been trying new things, but nothing seems to help. Everyone has suggestions on what to do or try, get a hobby, join a club yadda yadda. I’ve tried those things still nothing. My kindness always seems to be welcomed, but when I need some kindness of my own - everyone is missing. Call or text me when you need me then disappear. But I can’t stop being kind even though it rips my heart apart constantly. I want to find someone to be with. Someone who actually wants to talk to me daily, spend time with me , hold me, etc. I’m always clear with whoever I meet about what I want and they always agree - but then they ghost. I think my time for romantic love has passed and I’m sad for it. Everyone is so set in their ways, not willing to compromise, want me to take care of their bazillion kids or just can’t make time for me despite wanting a relationship. I’m sorry for crying in user sub about this. I just have no one else to talk to about it, that won’t lecture me.
item.dc:creator: QueenoftheGoblins

item.title: Wordwall alert
item.description: "The police arrived. My brother went over because his 11 year old son was there and wanted to ensure his son was okay. The police arrested my brother, charged him with resisting arrest, assault on an officer, aggravated battery on an officer. These charges carry a two to twenty year prison sentence. When I asked my brother what happened, he told me that the charges were made up. He asked about his son, the officers (3 of them) engaged him and decided to put him in the squad car. He never touched anyone. He never resisted. Because of the charges, he has no bail, and the bond hearing was set for a month out. I asked, “Were the officer’s bodycams on?” He replied, “No.” They said all their cams were off. I thought to myself. “Oh shit.” Then I replied, “Okay, sit tight, I’ll get you a lawyer.” But to be honest…without any camera footage, my brother was cooked. Now. I love my brother, and I know his character. I know there was no way he attacked three police officers. To be honest, if he did, they’d just shoot him. He’s a big black guy who spends a lot of time at the gym. No one would have challenged his death. But, that’s not who he is. However…SOMETHING must have happened, right? It couldn’t be that he just walked up, the police then put him in the car and charged him. That’s not real. 2 to 20 years in prison. Three officers are saying he attacked them. Aggravated Battery on a police officer. All of this was a month ago…labor day weekend. No video evidence, so it’s their word and his. He’s so fucking cooked. But wait. Remember the part where I said my brother walked over to his neighbor’s house? The neighbor’s ring door camera activated, and his lawyer has not one…but three videos from ring cameras and security cameras covering the entire event. You know what actually happened? Well, I’ll say it this way. As soon as the lawyer told the prosecution that they had camera footage from the ring camera, the prosecution dropped the assault and aggravated battery charge immediately. They downgraded the resisting arrest to a misdemeanor and gave my brother a 50,000 bond, which we immediately posted. They also added another charge (a misdemeanor), and handed the entire case from the felony prosecution to the misdemeanor prosecution who wanted to settle. My brother’s lawyer said…”No.” We want this fast tracked to trial. You’ve only seen one video. I have two more. The footage shows my brother walking up to the officers, them having a very normal conversation, and when my brother asked for his son, the officer told him “No.” My brother continued to ask, and the officer put him in cuffs and put him in the car for “protection of the officers.” That was it. No one even raised their voices. Now. Because this is still in flight, and my brother has plans to sue for wrongful arrest or something…which he’ll lose, I won’t say which department this is, but will post all the details after the case and suite are done. But here is the thing. Do you know what happened to the three police officers who made up the assault and aggravated battery on a police officer charges with the up to 20 year prison sentence? Nothing. Do you know what would have happened to my brother if those ring cameras didn’t kick in? I’m guessing he’d get about 7 years. What’s your guess? That’s the definition of a police state. They can just make something up to throw you in prison…and in the 1 in a 1000 chance you are able to prove your innocence, nothing happens. I still nearly tear up at the thought of how close he came. He’s a father of 4 who works for Mitsubishi building generators as a supervisor. And he nearly lost his freedom…for what. I yelled at him “You know never to engage with the police. You know better you fool.” All he could say is…”but my son was over there.” 30K for a lawyer (gone). 5K for the 50K bond (gone) all because you approached police. I’ll update the results when I can. But more than likely…nothing will happen." Dorand Tortuga, 2024
item.dc:creator: Heavenissize17socks

item.title: Wow! Sometimes the most random moments will go on to mean the absolute best memories!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: It’s been a week for me…
item.description: I have no patience for people who skew facts into conspiracies in order to invoke fear and manipulate narratives for personal gain or amusement. I’m a scientist. I do a service for people. If you think I’m part of a government agenda, you can rightly fuck off.
item.dc:creator: WeatherWiz

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1159 (captain trainwreck)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
How I feel many days.
Every bird I see is magic.
Hey ladies, if you wanna bang a monster, I'm right here!
Ayn Rand wants her quote back. Marcus was a nice guy (for a Roman emperor, anyway.)
Baaaaaaaaby! Baby Tyrannosaurus, specifically
At least, these are three reasons I stay around.
@racheKatze
I'm down for any of these ideologies, actually.
I'm going to give Hinge another week, then I'm gonna burn it down.
I'd argue that it was Susan's attachment to "worldly" things, not simply flesh things, but that could also be an equally problematic reading.... but Eustace Scrubb is definitely a disaster bisexual with a name like that.
I have decided that, ideally, I will be buried in my wizard robes in Pando, or, at least, have my ashes spread there if I can't get buried. My molecules will live forever in a Grove of aspens.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Okay. Good boy." [Quiet kissing noises] "What doing?"
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
